info.name: GoMobility — KYC APIs
info.description:
Driver KYC (Know Your Customer) APIs for GoMobility ride-hailing app.

## Setup
1. Set collection variable `BASE_URL` = `http://localhost:3000/api/v1`
2. Set collection variable `DRIVER_TOKEN` = JWT token from login response
3. Set collection variable `ADMIN_TOKEN` = JWT token from admin login

## KYC Flow (Driver)
1. Login → check `kyc.nextScreen` to decide which screen to show
2. GET /kyc/status → full document-wise status
3. POST /kyc/submit → upload each document (AADHAAR, PAN, DRIVING_LICENCE, VEHICLE_RC)
4. POST /kyc/bank → verify bank account
5. POST /kyc/face-match → upload selfie (only after Aadhaar verified)
6. Poll GET /kyc/status until `overallStatus = 'verified'`

item.name: 🔑 Auth (Reference)
item.description: Login se milta hai KYC status — driver login response mein `kyc` object hota hai

request.description:
## Login Response mein KYC info

Driver login hone ke baad response mein `kyc` object aata hai. Frontend isko padh ke decide karta hai ki kaun si screen dikhani hai.

### `kyc.nextScreen` values → Screen routing:
| nextScreen | Kaun si screen dikhao |
|---|---|
| `HOME` | Driver home screen (KYC complete, go online ho sakta hai) |
| `KYC_INTRO` | KYC shuru karne ki intro screen (pehli baar) |
| `KYC_UPLOAD` | Document upload screen (kuch docs baaki hain) |
| `KYC_UNDER_REVIEW` | "Documents under review" waiting screen |
| `KYC_RETRY` | Koi doc reject hua, retry karo |
| `ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED` | Account suspend ho gaya, support se contact karo |

### `kyc.canGoOnline`
- `true` → Driver go-online button enable karo
- `false` → Button disable rakho, KYC complete karo pehle

### Example Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "accessToken": "eyJ...",
    "refreshToken": "eyJ...",
    "user": {
      "id": 123,
      "phone": "9876543210",
      "fullName": "Ramesh Kumar",
      "role": "driver"
    },
    "kyc": {
      "overallStatus": "in_progress",
      "submittedDocs": 2,
      "verifiedDocs": 1,
      "canGoOnline": false,
      "verifiedAt": null,
      "nextScreen": "KYC_UPLOAD"
    }
  }
}
```

## GET /kyc/status

Driver ke saare documents ka status ek saath milta hai. Frontend is API ko call karta hai KYC progress screen pe.

### Response Fields:

**`overallStatus`** — Driver ka overall KYC state:
| Value | Matlab |
|---|---|
| `not_started` | Koi bhi document submit nahi hua |
| `in_progress` | Kuch documents submit hain, saare nahi |
| `pending_review` | Saare docs submit, admin review kar raha hai |
| `verified` | KYC complete, driver go-online ho sakta hai |
| `rejected` | Koi doc reject hua, retry karo |
| `suspended` | 3 baar se zyada fail → account suspend |

**`canGoOnline`** — `true` sirf tab jab `overallStatus = 'verified'`

**`documents[]`** — Har ek document (AADHAAR, PAN, DRIVING_LICENCE, VEHICLE_RC, BANK_ACCOUNT, SELFIE) ki entry:

| Field | Values | Matlab |
|---|---|---|
| `status` | `not_submitted` | Upload nahi ki |
| | `pending` | Processing ho raha hai |
| | `auto_verified` | Auto verify ho gaya ✅ |
| | `approved` | Admin ne approve kiya ✅ |
| | `manual_review` | Admin dekh raha hai ⏳ |
| | `rejected` | Reject hua ❌ |
| `canRetry` | `true/false` | Retry button dikhao ya nahi |
| `attemptsLeft` | `0-3` | Kitne retry baaki hain |
| `rejectionReason` | string | Reject kyun hua (user ko dikhao) |

**`nextAction`** — String message: "Please upload Aadhaar" etc. — user ko guide karne ke liye.

### Frontend Document Upload Order (Recommended):
1. AADHAAR (pehle ye karo — selfie ke liye zaruri)
2. PAN
3. DRIVING_LICENCE
4. VEHICLE_RC
5. BANK_ACCOUNT
6. SELFIE (sirf AADHAAR verify hone ke baad)

### Example Success Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "overallStatus": "in_progress",
    "submittedDocsCount": 3,
    "verifiedDocsCount": 2,
    "canGoOnline": false,
    "nextAction": "Please upload Vehicle RC",
    "documents": [
      {
        "type": "AADHAAR",
        "documentId": 1,
        "status": "auto_verified",
        "confidenceScore": 92,
        "canRetry": false
      },
      {
        "type": "PAN",
        "documentId": 2,
        "status": "auto_verified",
        "confidenceScore": 88,
        "canRetry": false
      },
      {
        "type": "DRIVING_LICENCE",
        "documentId": 3,
        "status": "rejected",
        "confidenceScore": 45,
        "canRetry": true,
        "attemptsLeft": 2,
        "rejectionReason": "Image not clear. Please upload a sharper image."
      },
      {
        "type": "VEHICLE_RC",
        "status": "not_submitted",
        "canRetry": true
      },
      {
        "type": "BANK_ACCOUNT",
        "status": "not_submitted",
        "canRetry": true
      },
      {
        "type": "SELFIE",
        "status": "not_submitted",
        "canRetry": true
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

## POST /kyc/submit — Aadhaar Upload (sirf front)

**Content-Type:** `multipart/form-data`

**Form Fields:**
| Field | Required | Values |
|---|---|---|
| `document_type` | ✅ | `AADHAAR` |
| `file` | ✅ | Aadhaar front image (JPG/PNG/PDF, max 10MB) |
| `file_back` | ❌ Optional | Aadhaar back side (address extract ke liye) |

**Auto-extracted data:**
- Name, DOB, Gender, State
- Masked Aadhaar number (XXXX XXXX 1234)

**Status flow:**
- `auto_verified` → Document valid hai, verified ✅
- `manual_review` → Thodi doubt, admin dekh lega ⏳
- `rejected` (422) → Image unclear / invalid document ❌

### Success Response (200):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "documentId": 1,
    "documentType": "AADHAAR",
    "status": "auto_verified",
    "confidenceScore": 92,
    "extractedData": {
      "name": "Ramesh Kumar",
      "dob": "1990-05-15",
      "gender": "M",
      "state": "Maharashtra",
      "masked": "XXXX XXXX 5678"
    },
    "message": "AADHAAR verified successfully"
  }
}
```

### Rejection Response (422):
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "data": {
    "documentId": 1,
    "documentType": "AADHAAR",
    "status": "rejected",
    "message": "Could not extract Aadhaar number. Please upload a clearer image.",
    "attemptsLeft": 2
  }
}
```

### Error Cases:
| HTTP | Reason |
|---|---|
| 400 | `file` ya `document_type` missing |
| 409 | Already verified (naye upload ki zarurat nahi) |
| 422 | Image unclear / invalid |
| 500 | S3 upload ya OCR service error |

## POST /kyc/submit — Aadhaar (Front + Back)

Back side bhejne se address, pin code, district bhi extract hota hai — recommended.

### Extra fields in extractedData:
```json
{
  "name": "Ramesh Kumar",
  "dob": "1990-05-15",
  "gender": "M",
  "state": "Maharashtra",
  "address": "123, Gandhi Nagar, Pune",
  "pin_code": "411001",
  "district": "Pune",
  "masked": "XXXX XXXX 5678"
}
```

## POST /kyc/submit — PAN Card

**Content-Type:** `multipart/form-data`

PAN OCR ke baad **NSDL government database** se verify hota hai.

**Auto-extracted data:**
- Name, Father name, DOB
- Masked PAN (ABCXXXXX1)
- Govt verification status
- Aadhaar seeding status

### Success Response (200):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "documentId": 2,
    "documentType": "PAN",
    "status": "auto_verified",
    "confidenceScore": 88,
    "extractedData": {
      "name": "RAMESH KUMAR",
      "father": "SURESH KUMAR",
      "dob": "15/05/1990",
      "masked": "ABCXXXXX1",
      "govt_verified": true,
      "pan_status": "E",
      "aadhaar_linked": true
    },
    "message": "PAN verified successfully"
  }
}
```

### Rejection (422) — PAN invalid in govt records:
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "PAN not found or invalid in government records"
}
```

### Error Cases:
| HTTP | Reason |
|---|---|
| 409 | PAN already verified |
| 422 | Invalid PAN / govt records mein nahi mila |

## POST /kyc/submit — Driving Licence

DL OCR ke baad **Sarathi (MoRTH) database** se verify hota hai.

**Auto-extracted data:**
- Name, Guardian, DOB, Blood Group
- Expiry date, Issue date
- Licence status (ACTIVE/INACTIVE)

### Success Response (200):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "documentId": 3,
    "documentType": "DRIVING_LICENCE",
    "status": "auto_verified",
    "confidenceScore": 85,
    "extractedData": {
      "name": "Ramesh Kumar",
      "dob": "1990-05-15",
      "blood_group": "B+",
      "expiry_date": "2030-05-14",
      "issue_date": "2010-05-15",
      "masked": "XXXX5678",
      "govt_verified": true,
      "dl_status": "ACTIVE"
    },
    "message": "DRIVING_LICENCE verified successfully"
  }
}
```

### Rejection — DL not active:
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "DRIVING_LICENCE not found or invalid in government records"
}
```

### Hard Fails (Admin cannot override):
- Driver age < 18
- DL status not ACTIVE in Sarathi

## POST /kyc/submit — Vehicle RC

RC **VAHAN (MoRTH) database** se verify hoti hai — insurance, fitness, permit bhi check hota hai.

**Auto-extracted + VAHAN verified data:**
- Owner name, Vehicle model, Type
- Registration date & validity
- Insurance expiry (agar expired → hard reject)
- Fitness expiry, Permit expiry
- PUCC expiry
- RC Status

### Success Response (200):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "documentId": 4,
    "documentType": "VEHICLE_RC",
    "status": "auto_verified",
    "confidenceScore": 90,
    "extractedData": {
      "owner": "Ramesh Kumar",
      "vehicle_model": "HONDA ACTIVA 6G",
      "vehicle_type": "Motor Cycle",
      "registration_date": "2022-03-10",
      "registration_validity": "2037-03-09",
      "insurance_expiry": "2025-03-09",
      "insurance_days_left": 180,
      "fitness_expiry": "2032-03-09",
      "rc_status": "ACTIVE",
      "vahan_verified": true,
      "masked": "MH12AB1234"
    },
    "message": "VEHICLE_RC verified successfully"
  }
}
```

### Hard Rejection — Insurance Expired (422):
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Vehicle insurance has expired. Please renew and resubmit."
}
```

### Warning (soft flag — uploaded but flagged):
Insurance expiry < 30 days → `INSURANCE_EXPIRING_SOON` fraud flag lagta hai, but document accept hota hai.

## POST /kyc/bank

Bank account verify karo **Cashfree penny-drop** se. File upload nahi hoti — sirf JSON body.

**Content-Type:** `application/json`

**Required Fields:**
| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `account_number` | string | Bank account number |
| `ifsc` | string | IFSC code (uppercase) |
| `name` | string | Account holder name (driver ke naam se match hona chahiye) |

**Penny-drop verification:**
- Cashfree 1 rupee transfer karke account validate karta hai
- Name match score bhi check hota hai

### Success Response (200) — always `auto_verified`:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Bank account verified successfully.",
  "data": {
    "documentId": 5,
    "documentType": "BANK_ACCOUNT",
    "status": "auto_verified",
    "extractedData": {
      "account_masked": "XXXX7890",
      "ifsc": "HDFC0001234",
      "holder_name": "RAMESH KUMAR",
      "bank_name": "HDFC Bank",
      "branch": "Pune Main Branch",
      "city": "Pune",
      "name_match_score": 95,
      "name_match_result": "STRONG_MATCH"
    },
    "message": "Bank account verified successfully."
  }
}
```

### Error Cases:
| HTTP | Reason |
|---|---|
| 400 | `account_number`/`ifsc`/`name` missing |
| 409 | Bank account already verified |
| 409 | Ye account kisi aur driver ke saath register hai |
| 422 | Account invalid ya details match nahi karte |

## POST /kyc/face-match

Driver ka selfie upload karo — Cashfree AI se Aadhaar photo ke saath face match hota hai.

**IMPORTANT:** Ye API tabhi kaam karti hai jab Aadhaar `auto_verified` ya `approved` ho. Pehle Aadhaar karo.

**Form Field:** `selfie` — Driver ka clear selfie (JPG/PNG)

**Matching Thresholds:**
| Score | Status | Matlab |
|---|---|---|
| >= 75% | `auto_verified` | Face match ✅ |
| 60-74% | `manual_review` | Admin manually dekh lega ⏳ |
| < 60% | `rejected` | Face match fail ❌ |

### Success Response (200) — auto_verified:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "documentId": 6,
    "documentType": "SELFIE",
    "status": "auto_verified",
    "confidenceScore": 87,
    "message": "Selfie verified successfully."
  }
}
```

### Manual Review Response (200):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "documentId": 6,
    "documentType": "SELFIE",
    "status": "manual_review",
    "confidenceScore": 65,
    "message": "Selfie submitted for admin review. You'll be notified within 24 hours."
  }
}
```

### Face Mismatch Response (422):
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "data": {
    "documentId": 6,
    "documentType": "SELFIE",
    "status": "rejected",
    "confidenceScore": 35,
    "message": "Face does not match Aadhaar. Please upload a clear selfie.",
    "attemptsLeft": 2
  }
}
```

### Error Cases:
| HTTP | Reason |
|---|---|
| 400 | Aadhaar pehle complete karo |
| 400 | `selfie` file missing |
| 409 | Selfie already verified |

query.description: Filter: not_started | in_progress | pending_review | verified | rejected | suspended

request.description:
## GET /kyc/admin/drivers

Saare drivers ki KYC list with filters.

**Query Params:**
| Param | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `status` | `not_started`, `in_progress`, `pending_review`, `verified`, `rejected`, `suspended` | All |
| `page` | number | 1 |
| `limit` | number | 20 |

### Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "items": [
      {
        "user_id": 123,
        "full_name": "Ramesh Kumar",
        "phone_number": "9876543210",
        "email": "ramesh@example.com",
        "overall_status": "in_progress",
        "submitted_docs_count": 3,
        "verified_docs_count": 2,
        "last_activity_at": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z",
        "verified_at": null
      }
    ],
    "total": 150
  }
}
```

query.description: Optional: AADHAAR | PAN | DRIVING_LICENCE | VEHICLE_RC | BANK_ACCOUNT | SELFIE

request.description:
## GET /kyc/admin/queue

Admin review queue — jo documents manually review ki zarurat hain.

Default `status=manual_review` — ye wo docs hain jo auto-verify nahi hue aur admin ko approve/reject karna hai.

### Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "items": [
      {
        "id": 5,
        "user_id": 123,
        "full_name": "Ramesh Kumar",
        "phone_number": "9876543210",
        "document_type": "DRIVING_LICENCE",
        "status": "manual_review",
        "file_url": "https://s3.amazonaws.com/...",
        "confidence_score": 55,
        "attempt_count": 1,
        "updated_at": "2024-01-15T10:00:00Z"
      }
    ],
    "total": 12
  }
}
```

## GET /kyc/admin/documents/:id

Ek specific document ka poora detail — extracted data, file URL, fraud flags sab.

### Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "id": 3,
    "user_id": 123,
    "full_name": "Ramesh Kumar",
    "phone_number": "9876543210",
    "document_type": "DRIVING_LICENCE",
    "status": "manual_review",
    "file_url": "https://s3.amazonaws.com/kyc/123/driving_licence/1234567890.jpg",
    "extracted_data": {
      "name": "Ramesh Kumar",
      "dob": "1990-05-15",
      "expiry_date": "2030-05-14",
      "dl_status": "ACTIVE",
      "govt_verified": true
    },
    "confidence_score": 55,
    "fraud_score": 0,
    "attempt_count": 1,
    "driver_overall_status": "in_progress"
  }
}
```

## POST /kyc/admin/documents/:id/approve

Admin manually document approve karta hai.

**Body:** `{ "notes": "optional notes" }`

**Hard restrictions (ye cases mein approve NAHI hoga):**
- Document tampered hai (is_overwritten / is_photo_imposed)
- Duplicate document (doosre user ke saath registered)
- Driver age < 18 (DL se DOB check)
- DL status ACTIVE nahi
- PAN status active nahi
- Vehicle RC expired

### Success Response (200):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Document approved",
  "data": {
    "id": 3,
    "status": "approved",
    "reviewed_by": 999,
    "verified_at": "2024-01-15T11:00:00Z"
  }
}
```

### Error (422) — Hard restriction:
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Cannot approve — driver is under 18 years of age"
}
```

**Side effect:** Agar sab 6 docs verify ho jate hain, driver ko `KYC_COMPLETE` notification milti hai aur `overallStatus = 'verified'` ho jaata hai.

## POST /kyc/admin/documents/:id/reject

Admin manually document reject karta hai.

**Body:**
| Field | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `reason` | ✅ | Reject reason (driver ko dikhega) |
| `allowRetry` | ❌ | Default `true`. `false` karo toh driver retry nahi kar sakta (permanent block) |

### Success Response (200):
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Document rejected",
  "data": {
    "id": 3,
    "status": "rejected",
    "rejection_reason": "Document blur hai, clear image upload karo"
  }
}
```

**Note:** Admin-rejected documents ko admin dobara approve nahi kar sakta. Decision final hota hai.

**`allowRetry: false` effect:** Driver ki attempts 3 ho jaati hain, matlab contact support ke siva koi option nahi.

## GET /kyc/admin/fraud-alerts

System-flagged suspicious documents.

**Fraud Flag Types:**
| Flag | Severity | Matlab |
|---|---|---|
| `FACE_MISMATCH` | HIGH/MEDIUM | Selfie Aadhaar se match nahi ki |
| `DUPLICATE_NUMBER` | HIGH | Ye document number kisi aur user ka bhi hai |
| `INSURANCE_EXPIRING_SOON` | MEDIUM | RC insurance 30 din mein expire |
| `FITNESS_EXPIRED` | HIGH | Vehicle fitness certificate expired |

### Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "document_id": 3,
      "document_type": "DRIVING_LICENCE",
      "user_id": 123,
      "full_name": "Ramesh Kumar",
      "phone_number": "9876543210",
      "flag_type": "DUPLICATE_NUMBER",
      "severity": "HIGH",
      "details": {},
      "created_at": "2024-01-15T10:00:00Z"
    }
  ]
}
```

## POST /kyc/admin/drivers/:userId/suspend

Driver ka account suspend karo — login ke baad `nextScreen = 'ACCOUNT_SUSPENDED'` aayega.

**Body:** `{ "reason": "..." }` (required)

### Response:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Driver suspended",
  "data": {
    "user_id": 123,
    "overall_status": "suspended",
    "suspended_at": "2024-01-15T12:00:00Z",
    "suspension_reason": "Fraudulent documents submitted multiple times"
  }
}
```

item.name: 📱 Frontend Integration Guide
item.description: Ye folder sirf reference ke liye hai — actual API calls nahi hain. Frontend team ke liye screen routing logic.
